changeSet.author: nexus-b7v6i
changeSet.comment: topic_assignments.doc_id → catalog_documents (tenant_id, tumbler) ON DELETE CASCADE. doc_id is NOT NULL (part of PK), so orphan rows must be deleted before the FK is added. Pre-flight: remove any topic_assignment rows whose doc_id has no matching catalog_documents entry for the same tenant. On a fresh DB this is a no-op.
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE nexus.topic_assignments DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_ta_catalog_doc; DROP INDEX IF EXISTS nexus.idx_ta_tenant_doc_id_fk;

changeSet.author: nexus-b7v6i
changeSet.comment: document_aspects.doc_id: convert '' default to nullable, then add FK ON DELETE CASCADE. Step 1: Nullify empty-string doc_ids (the old "not yet set" sentinel). Step 2: Nullify orphan doc_ids (value set but catalog_documents has no matching row). Step 3: Drop DEFAULT '' and NOT NULL constraint → column becomes nullable. Step 4: Add composite FK (tenant_id, doc_id) → catalog_documents(tenant_id, tumbler). NULL doc_id satisfies the FK (no constraint violation); only non-NULL values are checked.

changeSet.author: nexus-b7v6i
changeSet.comment: document_highlights.doc_id → catalog_documents (tenant_id, tumbler) ON DELETE CASCADE. doc_id is NOT NULL (unique key tenant_id, doc_id). Orphan rows must be deleted. Pre-flight: delete highlights whose doc_id has no matching catalog_documents row.
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE nexus.document_highlights DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS fk_doc_highlights_catalog_doc; DROP INDEX IF EXISTS nexus.idx_doc_highlights_doc_id_fk;

changeSet.author: nexus-b7v6i
changeSet.comment: aspect_extraction_queue.doc_id: convert '' default to nullable, FK ON DELETE CASCADE. Stale queue items for a deleted catalog document should not survive — document_aspects also cascades, so the resulting aspects would have no valid parent anyway. CASCADE also sidesteps the PG14 limitation where SET NULL on a composite FK nullifies all FK columns (including tenant_id which is NOT NULL).
